expectations.evidence: PARTIAL: called the API endpoint, got 404 (correct result), but no systematic fallback to check rulesets or org-level rules without skill guidance.
No cross-referencing of required checks against actual CI workflows in .github/workflows/.

expectations.text: Warns about bootstrap deadlock if checks missing
expectations.evidence: No awareness of the deadlock scenario — not attempted without skill.
No logic to surface the development convention from CLAUDE.md or warn that feature/*→main bypasses standard flow.
